summary_template: Based on {post_count} recent Reddit posts, overall sentiment around "{topic}" reads as {sentiment_label} (weighted avg {avg_sentiment}). This summary was generated in demo mode because the synthesis model was unavailable, but the underlying post data is real.
recommendations: Monitor community discussion for this topic over the next few weeks to confirm the signal holds.
Reach out directly to a few vocal posters to understand the reasoning behind their sentiment.
Validate this reading against another source (survey, support tickets) before making a major decision.
